articles.title: Jayson Tatum has strong return to playoffs for Celtics, who rout 76ers 123-91 in Game 1
articles.description:
Tatum scored 21 points in the first half, playing in just his 17th game this season following surgery last May to repair his Achilles tendon.

The post Jayson Tatum has strong return to playoffs for Celtics, who rout 76ers 123-91 in Game 1 appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: 8 children between the ages of 1 and 14 are dead after a mass shooting in Louisiana, police say
articles.description:
The suspect died after a police pursuit, and the victims — who ranged in age from 1 to about 14 years old — included children related to the gunman, said Shreveport Police Department spokesperson Chris Bordelon.
